commands.name: request

options.help: Do not auto-wrap JSON payloads in {"data": ...}

commands.summary: Run a generic Asana API request
commands.usage: usage: asana_api.py request [-h] [--query QUERY] [--opt-fields OPT_FIELDS] [--opt-expand OPT_EXPAND] [--data DATA] [--data-file DATA_FILE] [--no-wrap-data] [--form FORM] [--file FILE] [--paginate] [--limit-pages LIMIT_PAGES] [--compact] method path

commands.name: whoami
commands.usage: usage: asana_api.py whoami [-h] [--compact]

commands.name: workspaces
commands.summary: List workspaces for the authenticated user
commands.usage: usage: asana_api.py workspaces [-h] [--compact]

commands.name: teams
commands.usage: usage: asana_api.py teams [-h] [--workspace WORKSPACE] [--compact]

commands.name: users
commands.usage: usage: asana_api.py users [-h] [--workspace WORKSPACE] [--opt-fields OPT_FIELDS] [--paginate] [--limit-pages LIMIT_PAGES] [--compact]

commands.name: projects

options.help: Team GID or exact team name from asana-context.json

commands.usage: usage: asana_api.py projects [-h] [--team TEAM] [--compact]

commands.name: task
commands.usage: usage: asana_api.py task [-h] [--opt-fields OPT_FIELDS] [--compact] task_gids [task_gids ...]

commands.name: story
commands.summary: Inspect one or more stories/comments by gid
commands.usage: usage: asana_api.py story [-h] [--opt-fields OPT_FIELDS] [--compact] story_gids [story_gids ...]

commands.name: task-bundle

options.help: Project GID to include section order and project custom field settings

commands.summary: Fetch one or more tasks with comments, attachments, and optional project workflow context
commands.usage: usage: asana_api.py task-bundle [-h] [--project-gid PROJECT_GID] [--task-opt-fields TASK_OPT_FIELDS] [--story-opt-fields STORY_OPT_FIELDS] [--attachment-opt-fields ATTACHMENT_OPT_FIELDS] [--compact] task_gids [task_gids ...]

commands.name: task-status

options.help: Limit membership analysis to one project GID
Also look up the task's position inside its current section

commands.summary: Summarize completion and board-column status for one or more tasks
commands.usage: usage: asana_api.py task-status [-h] [--project PROJECT] [--opt-fields OPT_FIELDS] [--include-task-position] [--compact] task_gids [task_gids ...]

commands.name: project
commands.usage: usage: asana_api.py project [-h] [--opt-fields OPT_FIELDS] [--compact] project_gids [project_gids ...]

commands.name: board

options.help: Override per-task fields in board output
Include workflow context stats (field coverage, staleness, assignee distribution)

commands.summary: Return project sections in order with tasks in each section
commands.usage: usage: asana_api.py board [-h] [--opt-fields OPT_FIELDS] [--context] [--compact] project_gid

commands.name: project-tasks
commands.usage: usage: asana_api.py project-tasks [-h] [--opt-fields OPT_FIELDS] [--paginate] [--limit-pages LIMIT_PAGES] [--compact] project_gid

commands.name: project-assigned-tasks

options.help: Assignee filter, defaults to the current user from asana-context.json; accepts gid, exact cached name, or exact cached email
Also look up each task's position inside its effective board section
Include recent comment context for each task
Maximum number of recent comments to keep per task when --include-comments is set
Include task attachments and derived image URLs for each task

commands.summary: List assigned work in a project, including matching subtasks with parent section context
commands.usage: usage: asana_api.py project-assigned-tasks [-h] [--workspace WORKSPACE] [--assignee ASSIGNEE] [--completed COMPLETED] [--opt-fields OPT_FIELDS] [--include-task-position] [--include-comments] [--comment-limit COMMENT_LIMIT] [--include-attachments] [--paginate] [--limit-pages LIMIT_PAGES] [--compact] project_gid

commands.name: sections
commands.usage: usage: asana_api.py sections [-h] [--opt-fields OPT_FIELDS] [--compact] project_gid

commands.name: section
commands.usage: usage: asana_api.py section [-h] [--opt-fields OPT_FIELDS] [--compact] section_gids [section_gids ...]

commands.name: section-tasks
commands.usage: usage: asana_api.py section-tasks [-h] [--opt-fields OPT_FIELDS] [--paginate] [--limit-pages LIMIT_PAGES] [--compact] section_gid

commands.name: create-section
commands.summary: Create a section in a project
commands.usage: usage: asana_api.py create-section [-h] --name NAME [--compact] project_gid

commands.name: update-section
commands.usage: usage: asana_api.py update-section [-h] --name NAME [--compact] section_gid

commands.name: close-out-sections

options.help: Source section gid or exact name; pass multiple times for multiple sections
Destination section gid or exact name within the same project
Which tasks to relocate before attempting deletion
Stop section task pagination after N pages while collecting tasks
Move selected tasks and delete sections that end up empty

commands.summary: Relocate tasks out of section(s) and delete the section(s) once empty
commands.usage: usage: asana_api.py close-out-sections [-h] --section SECTION [--move-to MOVE_TO] [--completed-mode {all,completed,incomplete}] [--limit-pages LIMIT_PAGES] [--apply] [--compact] project_gid

commands.name: search-tasks

options.help: Assignee filter, e.g. me, user gid, exact cached user name, or exact cached email

commands.usage: usage: asana_api.py search-tasks [-h] --text TEXT [--workspace WORKSPACE] [--project PROJECT] [--assignee ASSIGNEE] [--completed COMPLETED] [--opt-fields OPT_FIELDS] [--paginate] [--limit-pages LIMIT_PAGES] [--compact]

commands.name: inbox-cleanup

options.help: My Tasks section name to triage from; defaults to Recently assigned
Ignore source-section filtering and include all open tasks in My Tasks
Write the AI-gating snapshot JSON to this file in addition to stdout
Write an editable cleanup plan template JSON to this file
Path to an AI-authored cleanup plan JSON to preview or apply
Apply the provided AI-authored plan file by moving tasks into the requested sections
When applying a plan, also move tasks marked low confidence instead of leaving them for user review
Limit how many filtered tasks to process after section filtering
Do not follow My Tasks next_page links
Stop My Tasks pagination after N pages

commands.summary: Generate an AI-gated My Tasks cleanup snapshot or apply an AI-authored cleanup plan
commands.usage: usage: asana_api.py inbox-cleanup [-h] [--workspace WORKSPACE] [--source-section SOURCE_SECTION] [--all-open] [--snapshot-file SNAPSHOT_FILE] [--plan-template-file PLAN_TEMPLATE_FILE] [--plan-file PLAN_FILE] [--apply] [--include-low-confidence] [--max-tasks MAX_TASKS] [--no-paginate] [--limit-pages LIMIT_PAGES] [--compact]

commands.name: daily-briefing

options.help: Limit how many My Tasks items to include in the briefing snapshot
Do not follow My Tasks next_page links
Stop My Tasks pagination after N pages
Write the daily briefing snapshot JSON to this file in addition to stdout
Write an editable daily briefing plan template JSON to this file
Path to an AI-authored daily briefing plan JSON to render
Print the rendered markdown briefing from the provided AI-authored plan instead of JSON

commands.summary: Generate an AI-gated daily briefing snapshot or render an AI-authored morning briefing plan
commands.usage: usage: asana_api.py daily-briefing [-h] [--workspace WORKSPACE] [--max-tasks MAX_TASKS] [--no-paginate] [--limit-pages LIMIT_PAGES] [--snapshot-file SNAPSHOT_FILE] [--plan-template-file PLAN_TEMPLATE_FILE] [--plan-file PLAN_FILE] [--markdown] [--compact]

commands.name: create-task

options.help: Assignee gid, me, exact cached user name, or exact cached email
Anchor task GID, section/project sentinel GID, or literal null
Anchor task GID, section/project sentinel GID, or literal null

commands.usage: usage: asana_api.py create-task [-h] --name NAME [--workspace WORKSPACE] [--project PROJECT] [--section SECTION] [--parent PARENT] [--assignee ASSIGNEE] [--notes NOTES] [--html-notes HTML_NOTES] [--due-on DUE_ON] [--due-at DUE_AT] [--custom-field CUSTOM_FIELD] [--insert-before INSERT_BEFORE] [--insert-after INSERT_AFTER] [--compact]

commands.name: update-task

options.help: Assignee gid, me, exact cached user name, or exact cached email
Anchor task GID, section/project sentinel GID, or literal null
Anchor task GID, section/project sentinel GID, or literal null

commands.usage: usage: asana_api.py update-task [-h] [--name NAME] [--project PROJECT] [--section SECTION] [--assignee ASSIGNEE] [--notes NOTES] [--html-notes HTML_NOTES] [--due-on DUE_ON] [--due-at DUE_AT] [--completed COMPLETED] [--custom-field CUSTOM_FIELD] [--insert-before INSERT_BEFORE] [--insert-after INSERT_AFTER] [--compact] task_gid

commands.name: comment-task

options.help: Read plain-text comment body from file
Read rich-text HTML comment body from file

commands.usage: usage: asana_api.py comment-task [-h] [--text TEXT] [--text-file TEXT_FILE] [--html-text HTML_TEXT] [--html-text-file HTML_TEXT_FILE] [--compact] task_gid

commands.name: update-story

options.help: Read plain-text comment body from file
Read rich-text HTML comment body from file

commands.usage: usage: asana_api.py update-story [-h] [--text TEXT] [--text-file TEXT_FILE] [--html-text HTML_TEXT] [--html-text-file HTML_TEXT_FILE] [--compact] story_gid

commands.summary: List only comment stories on one or more tasks, including text and html_text

Enum option name; repeat for multiple values

commands.usage: usage: asana_api.py create-custom-field [-h] --name NAME [--workspace WORKSPACE] --resource-subtype RESOURCE_SUBTYPE [--description DESCRIPTION] [--precision PRECISION] [--enum-option ENUM_OPTION] [--compact]

options.help: Task GID where rule actions will be performed
Custom key=value data available as dynamic variables in rule actions (repeatable)

positionals.help: Trigger identifier from the Asana rule's incoming web request URL

commands.summary: Trigger an existing Asana rule that has a 'web request received' trigger
commands.usage: usage: asana_api.py trigger-rule [-h] --task TASK_GID [--action-data KEY=VALUE] [--compact] trigger_identifier
